aru: lani ne na ra ya Aru.
na ra waro we ya Mira.
u ra sela ke malo maru.

en: Do you hear the night / darkness?

aru: mata ne na ra sela ke tulu.
nuko ne ta ra lora ke waro.

en: The tool is on top of the house.
The child is beside the parent.

aru: temu luma nu le, na ra salo.
temu luma pa le, na ra pa miso.
temu luma po le, na ra po tanu.
na ra nu kani ke pani.
ta ra po naka ko tera para.
en: You will go to a far place.

aru: ta o kani ke pani welo.

en: The food is in the container.

aru: tulu i ra ko sela para.
en: This tool is for distant seeing.

aru: na ra nema ke ya Aru.
ta ra sona ke naru ne waro.
en: You know the rules of speech.

aru: u ra sona maku ke tulu.
en: They know how to make a tool.

aru: na ra rima sona waro nela.
en: I want to know how to speak well.

aru: ta ra no tanu so etu se?
na ra no kani ke pani.
no na ra kani ke pani.
na ra kani ke no pani.
na ra no naka so etu nilo.
en: I do not go because of cold.

aru: na ra no naka so etu i le, u ra nilo.
en: I do not go because it is cold.

aru: u ra miso so etu salo maru.
en: They rest because of much work.

aru: ta ra tanu so etu rima ne na?
en: Did you come because of my wish?

aru: u ra naka, sia na ra naka.
lani ne ta ra ya Mira.

en: The house for the child is near.
The water from the river is clean.

aru: mene re ri ra maku ke malo, ra nela.
en: The person who builds a house is good.

aru: malo re na ra sela ke ri, ra maru.
en: The house that I see is big.

aru: mene re na ra lano ke pani ko ri, ra melo ne na.
en: The person to whom I give food is my friend.

aru: tulu re ta ra kipa ke ri, ra kasa.
en: The tool you hold is hard.

aru: malo re na ra to ri, ra nilo.
en: The house where I am is cold.

aru: malo i ra maru pasu malo ena.
en: This house is bigger than that house.

aru: tulu i ra nela pasu tulu ena.
en: This tool is better than that tool.

aru: wai i ra welo mini pasu wai ena.
en: This water is less hot than that water.

aru: mene i ra riki sama pasu mene ena.
en: This person is as fast as that one.

aru: malo i ra maru pasu ora.
na ra sona ke i le, u ra pa tanu.
ta ra rima ke i le, na ra naka.
u ra sela ke i le, na ra maku ke malo.
en: They see that I build a house.

aru: na ra waro ke i le, ya Aru ra lisu.
en: I say that Aru is simple.

aru: ta ra sano ke i le, na ra po tanu?
en: Do you believe that I will come?
I have pain in my leg.

aru: kute ne ta ra kipa ke tulu.
muto ne u ra no waro.

en: The plant is on the ground.
The animal moves by the river.
The wind moves with the light / sun.
The sea is bigger than the river.
This document is mine / related to me.
The image is on the sheet / in the book.

aru: na ra no rima ke naru maru.
en: I do not want big rules.
